title: オカルト？ノンノン☆これがリアル風水

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tip-tap, tip-tap!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Come on, hurry up! This way!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tryouts are about to start, but Copano Rickey feels a strange shift
in the atmosphere. She runs into the building, and as she leaps up the
stairs...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Good! From here, I can...
choice_data_list: Why are we on the roof?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Because when you want to see the whole picture, the best way is to
get a bird's-eye view from above! This is geographical feng shui in
action!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Let me see if I can find what's causing this qi disruption...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, over there! In that corner! A lot of trainers are gathering in one
spot. But why?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Is it because of the renovations on the track? Oh, I know—the next
race has a lot of front runners, so they probably want to watch the
fight for position. The two just so happened to coincide!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, it's not safe for them to run like this! We have to stop the
race from happening!
choice_data_list:
We can't do that. Besides, we wouldn't make it
down there in time.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Can't we shout?! I don't know if they'd believe us over the
phone.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
At least the disruption doesn't look like it'll get any bigger.
Hopefully, the five elements can ward off misfortune long enough to
see them through...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The race begins...

text_block_list.name: Racer A
text_block_list.text: Hey, run straight! Are you even looking?! Out of my way!

text_block_list.name: Racer B
text_block_list.text: You're the one who needs to move! Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race ends without any disqualifications or tumbles, but as Copano
Rickey predicted, it was quite the rough race.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I'm so glad nothing disastrous happened. Thankfully, it wasn't
too bad.
choice_data_list:
How did you know something was wrong? By
instinct?

How did you know something was wrong? By
instinct?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Instinct? Not at all! Feng shui isn't something wishy-washy like that!
It's a well-established discipline!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Remember when we looked down from the roof? Well, that's when I
realized.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In the qian direction... that is to say, the northwest, a group of
trainers had gathered to watch the race.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Their presence pulled the racers' attention towards the qian direction,
and when everyone's qi is in the realm of do-or-die competition...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural for racers to miss small things, like being careless
while turning the corner in front of them, or even crashing into
another racer.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In other words, you have to always be on the lookout for inauspicious
turns and the borders of the eight trigrams.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I could see all of that through feng shui. Not just me, but anyone
could've seen that coming if they had the proper knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui isn't superstition. It's an ancient practice that has been
honed over 3,000 years—a study of environmental luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought she was just the superstitious type, but maybe I was wrong.
She did back herself up, and her predictions even came true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The feng shui-obsessed Copano Rickey might be a lot more sensible
than I first thought. Who knows? She could be hiding limitless
potential.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
See? Now you understand how amazing feng shui is, right? It lets you
see into the future! I bet you can't wait to tell everyone about it!
choice_data_list: I don't know if I'd go that far...
I don't know if I'd go that far...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: What?! You're a tough nut to crack, huh?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well then, I'll give it one last push! I'm in the next race, so watch me
run!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you the power of feng shui in action! ☆ After this, you won't
be able to deny it anymore. It'll be the best proof yet!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The qi of the earth is always with me. When I get really into my
running, I can even hear its voice! Here I go! Rickey! ☆ Lucky! ☆
Great victory!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm left pondering about the earth's voice as she heads off to run in
the next tryout—a mile race on turf.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(It's started! Okay, no problems so far, and the formation is as
expected. If I imagine the eight trigrams lying over the track, it's easy
to read my place.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: For the moment, I'll keep up this pace. ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Here! Right before the last corner! This is where it comes down to
reading. I've got to pay attention to the qi around me...)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to listen to the earth's voice and run toward the flow
of qi...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Now, where will it lead me today?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wait, what? Huh?! What's going on?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I can't hear the earth's voice today! No, this can't be happening!
Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey loses the race, failing to show off the power of feng
shui that she had so confidently declared.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm telling you, that's not how it usually goes! Normally, the
earth's voice guides me across the finish line in first!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Something was off today. The balance of the elements? Or the
influence of the wind? Maybe I was thrown off by the trouble in the
last race.

Rickey, you were a mess out there... But I guess it was inevitable.
Predictable, even.

You've got to stop going on and on about feng shui. Wake up and
put that energy into training!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tarumae... So you saw my race, huh?
choice_data_list: Um, and who might you be?
Um, and who might you be?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Hello, I'm Hokko Tarumae, a friend of Rickey's. I come from
Tomakomai, where I perform as a local idol.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Rickey constantly pushes her feng shui onto me, and frankly, I'm tired
of it. I hope she comes to her senses soon and stops.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You mean you still don't believe me? Feng shui really is powerful! That said...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I don't know what went wrong today. Oooooh, I just don't get it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey laments her defeat with Hokko Tarumae. Is there
really any truth to feng shui? And if there is, why didn't it work for her
today?
